name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Our campaign platform
body:
#
Friend -

As you know, I just announced my candidacy last Thursday -- and what a few days it has been.

While we will never raise as much money as our opponents who receive huge donations from wealthy individuals and super PACs, I have been amazed by the outpouring of grassroots financial support that we have secured. While my opponents hold fundraising events in which a handful of millionaires make huge contributions, we are gaining extraordinary support with modest contributions coming from the working families and middle class of our country.

That's what my politics is all about. That's what I want to do throughout this campaign. And I want to thank all of you for your support.

This campaign will take on the biggest challenges facing our country. We must stand up and fight back. We must launch a political revolution which engages millions of Americans from all walks of life in the struggle for real change.

**[Sign on to endorse our campaign's progressive platform -- click here to add your name.](http://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2137/43f17890/5e3d2117/621df0b8/702172147/VEsH/ "http://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/platform?source=em150507m-platform&utm_medium=email&utm_source=berniesanders&utm_campaign=platform&utm_content=mediummessage")** Here's what this campaign is going to talk about:

**Income and wealth inequality:** In the United States today we have the most unequal wealth and income distribution of any major country on earth -- worse than at any time since the 1920s. This is an economy that must be changed in fundamental ways.

**Jobs and income** : In my view, we need a massive federal jobs program which puts millions of our people back to work. We must end our disastrous trade policies. We need to raise the minimum wage to a living wage. And we have to fight for pay equity for women.

**Campaign finance reform** : As a result of the Citizens United Supreme Court decision, American democracy is being undermined by the ability of the Koch brothers and other billionaire families. These wealthy contributors can literally buy politicians and elections by spending hundreds of millions of dollars in support of the candidates of their choice. We need to overturn Citizens United and move toward public funding of elections so that all candidates can run for office without being beholden to the wealthy and powerful.

**Climate change** : Climate change is real, caused by human activity and already devastating our nation and planet. The United States must lead the world in combating climate change and transforming our energy system away from fossil fuels and toward energy efficiency and sustainability.

**College affordability** : Every person in this country who has the desire and ability should be able to get all the education they need regardless of the income of their family. This is not a radical idea. In Germany, Scandinavia and many other countries, higher education is either free or very inexpensive. We must do the same.

**Health care** : Shamefully, the United States remains the only major country on earth that does not guarantee health care to all people. The United States must move toward a Medicare-for-all single-payer system. Health care is a right, not a privilege.

**Poverty** : The United States has more people living in poverty than at almost any time in the modern history of our country. I believe that in a democratic, civilized society none of our people should be hungry or living in desperation. We need to expand Social Security, not cut it. We need to increase funding for nutrition programs, not cut them.

**Tax reform:** We need real tax reform which makes the rich and profitable corporations begin to pay their fair share of taxes. We need a tax system which is fair and progressive. Children should not go hungry in this country while profitable corporations and the wealthy avoid their tax responsibilities by stashing their money in the Cayman Islands.

And these are just some of the issues that we will be dealing with.

**[Stand with me and endorse this platform for our campaign.](http://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2137/43f17890/5e3d2117/621df0b8/702172147/VEsE/ "http://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/platform?source=em150507m-platform&utm_medium=email&utm_source=berniesanders&utm_campaign=platform&utm_content=mediummessage")**

The struggle to create a nation and world of economic and social justice and environmental sanity is not an easy one. The struggle to try and create a more peaceful world will be extremely difficult. But this I know: despair is not an option if we care about our kids and grandchildren. Giving up is not an option if we want to prevent irreparable harm to our planet.

This country belongs to all of us, not just the billionaire class. That's what our campaign is all about, but it cannot be won by me alone. That is absolutely for sure. To win this campaign, all of us must be deeply involved.

In the coming days, weeks, and months we need to hear your ideas as to what issues are most important in your communities. We need to hear your thoughts about how we can mount the effective campaign we need to win. We need your help in spreading the word so that your friends, neighbors and co-workers become involved in the effort.

**[Please stand with me. Please join the grassroots revolution that we desperately need.](http://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2137/43f17890/5e3d2117/621df0b8/702172147/VEsF/ "http://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/platform?source=em150507m-platform&utm_medium=email&utm_source=berniesanders&utm_campaign=platform&utm_content=mediummessage")**

Sincerely,

Senator Bernie Sanders

[](http://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2137/43f17890/5e3d2117/621df0b9/702172147/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=emb150507m")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
(not the billionaires)
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but if you'd like to, click here to [unsubscribe](http://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2137/43f17890/5e3d2117/621df0a6/702172147/VEsD/ "http://go.berniesanders.com/unsubscribe"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](http://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2137/43f17890/5e3d2117/621df0a7/702172147/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Marco Rubio
subject: A critical state
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41933862:16929959381:m:1:1349778030:98967277C0C1699F2BBC8C76B84067CC:r)
---
Peter As home to the first presidential primary, New Hampshire plays an absolutely critical role in our campaign. I visited for the first time as a candidate last month and spoke with Granite Staters about our campaign and vision for a New American Century. **[_Take a moment to watch this video featuring highlights from that trip and make a contribution to ensure our New Hampshire operation has the resources it needs to be successful:_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41933863:16929959381:m:1:1349778030:98967277C0C1699F2BBC8C76B84067CC:r)** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41933863:16929959381:m:1:1349778030:98967277C0C1699F2BBC8C76B84067CC:r) Campaigning in New Hampshire is a lot like my very first political campaign for commissioner in West Miami: you go from door to door and talk with voters about their concerns and what's important to them. The good news is that's exactly how I won back in Florida and we're fortunate to have early supporters who are willing to host me in their homes to chat with their neighbors. Your support ensures that I'm able to return to New Hampshire often to build our campaign there. **[_Click here to watch the video and contribute to our New Hampshire campaign._](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41933863:16929959381:m:1:1349778030:98967277C0C1699F2BBC8C76B84067CC:r)** Thanks for your help! Marco Rubio
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41933864:16929959381:m:1:1349778030:98967277C0C1699F2BBC8C76B84067CC:r)
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41933865:16929959381:m:1:1349778030:98967277C0C1699F2BBC8C76B84067CC:r)
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41933866:16929959381:m:1:1349778030:98967277C0C1699F2BBC8C76B84067CC:r)
| Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |
---|---|---

name: Ben Carson
subject: I cannot overstate this
body:
| [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27618871:26562056443:m:1:876315805:D48B3803356AFBE0C89356C225A86335:r)
---
|

Peter, I'll get right to the point.

**I cannot overstate how important this first week is to my campaign for President.**

The political class, which exists in both parties and the media, is watching closely. I know they'd like nothing more than to declare our movement a flash in the pan.

I need your help to prove them wrong, and send a clear signal that we, the American people, are ready to re-establish ourselves as the center of power in this great nation.

[**If you haven't yet donated, I ask you to do so now. If you have already given, I ask you to consider doing so again, no matter how small. With enough people, it all adds up.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27618871:26562056443:m:1:876315805:D48B3803356AFBE0C89356C225A86335:r)

| [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27618871:26562056443:m:1:876315805:D48B3803356AFBE0C89356C225A86335:r)
---

The cynics say that I don't have any "experience." Well, they are correct. I don't have a lot of experience busting budgets or doing the kinds of things that have gotten us into all the trouble we are in now.

My experience has been in leading teams in extremely difficult circumstances to solve problems, some of which I was told over and again could not be solved.

So please help me today. This is our week to send a message to the political class that our movement is real, that it is strong, and that it is not going away.

[**Again, if you have not yet donated to Carson America, today is the day. If you've already given, I ask you to consider giving again, even if it's very little. **](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27618871:26562056443:m:1:876315805:D48B3803356AFBE0C89356C225A86335:r)

Thank you so much for your prayers, participation, and continued support.

Let's keep moving forward.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27618871:26562056443:m:1:876315805:D48B3803356AFBE0C89356C225A86335:r) [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27618872:26562056443:m:1:876315805:D48B3803356AFBE0C89356C225A86335:r)
---
|
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27618873:26562056443:m:1:876315805:D48B3803356AFBE0C89356C225A86335:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27618874:26562056443:m:1:876315805:D48B3803356AFBE0C89356C225A86335:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27618875:26562056443:m:1:876315805:D48B3803356AFBE0C89356C225A86335:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27618876:26562056443:m:1:876315805:D48B3803356AFBE0C89356C225A86335:r)

name: Terry Sullivan, MarcoRubio.com
subject: May schedule
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41941748:16935325305:m:1:1349778030:052B5E03EE7C1FD57C9F5A747CDB5331:r)
---
Peter, I just looked at Marco's May schedule and it's filled with fundraisers. That's because it takes a lot of money to run for president, but the truth is, I would much rather have him campaigning in the early states, like New Hampshire. **[_Earlier this morning, Marco shared this video of highlights from his first trip as a candidate to New Hampshire:_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41941749:16935325305:m:1:1349778030:052B5E03EE7C1FD57C9F5A747CDB5331:r)** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41941749:16935325305:m:1:1349778030:052B5E03EE7C1FD57C9F5A747CDB5331:r) When you donate online, you'll directly support Marco's critical, early state travel not only by funding the trips, but by making sure we have him on the trail, speaking to voters instead of flying around the country attending fundraisers. **_[Click here to give now and help Marco return to New Hampshire and other key states.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41941749:16935325305:m:1:1349778030:052B5E03EE7C1FD57C9F5A747CDB5331:r)_** Terry Sullivan Campaign Manager Marco Rubio for President
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41941750:16935325305:m:1:1349778030:052B5E03EE7C1FD57C9F5A747CDB5331:r)
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41941751:16935325305:m:1:1349778030:052B5E03EE7C1FD57C9F5A747CDB5331:r)
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41941752:16935325305:m:1:1349778030:052B5E03EE7C1FD57C9F5A747CDB5331:r)

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: FWD: Sign if you agree ✏ Congress does NOT deserve a raise
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Unless Congress acts now, precious tax dollars will go toward an automatic pay raise for members of Congress. Congress is set to get an automatic raise -- unless we act now. **Will you please join me in saying: Congress does NOT deserve a raise?** **[act.murphyforflorida.com/No-Raise-For-Congress](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae279f/738133e4/39adf7ca/7f9ba885/1113039929/VEsH/ "http://signforgood.com/noraiseforcongress/?code=murphy")** \- Patrick Murphy \---------Forwarded message--------- Date: Tuesday, April 7, 2015
Subject: Sign if you agree ✏ Congress does NOT deserve a raise Friend -- While Americans are still struggling to recover from the recession, every tax dollar must go toward building the economy and creating good, high-paying jobs. **Unfortunately, some politicians in Washington disagree. Unless Congress acts now, precious tax dollars will go toward an automatic pay raise for members of Congress. Join me in saying:[Congress doesn't deserve a raise >>](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae279f/738133e4/39adf7ca/7f9ba885/1113039929/VEsE/ "http://signforgood.com/noraiseforcongress/?code=murphy")** I'm co-sponsoring a new bill called the _No Raise for Congress Act_ with colleagues from both sides of the aisle. The _No Raise for Congress Act_ would permanently eliminate automatic pay raises for members of Congress. I'm running for Senate because I believe that Washington has a responsibility to create an environment that spurs job growth -- and then to get out of the way. The government's resources should be focused on investing in infrastructure, revitalizing our education system, and helping our veterans find employment. With so much left to be done to help Americans get back to work, we can't let Congress use limited funds to give themselves a raise. **That 's why my colleagues and I are asking you to join us today in holding Washington accountable and saying Congress does not deserve an automatic raise:** **[Sign your name to demand Congress pass the _No Raise for Congress Act_ without delay >>](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae279f/738133e4/39adf7ca/7f9ba885/1113039929/VEsF/ "http://signforgood.com/noraiseforcongress/?code=murphy")** Thank you for your support, Patrick Murphy | **[Contribute »](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-may2015?refcode=ema_2015-05-07_b1_pm_ldnd&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
---

clean_body: | Unless Congress acts now, precious tax dollars will go toward an automatic pay raise for members of Congress. Congress is set to get an automatic raise -- unless we act now. Will you please join me in saying: Congress does NOT deserve a raise? "" \- Patrick Murphy \---------Forwarded message--------- Date: Tuesday, April 7, 2015 Subject: Sign if you agree ✏ Congress does NOT deserve a raise Friend -- While Americans are still struggling to recover from the recession, every tax dollar must go toward building the economy and creating good, high-paying jobs. Unfortunately, some politicians in Washington disagree. Unless Congress acts now, precious tax dollars will go toward an automatic pay raise for members of Congress. Join me in saying: "" I'm co-sponsoring a new bill called the No Raise for Congress Act with colleagues from both sides of the aisle. The No Raise for Congress Act would permanently eliminate automatic pay raises for members of Congress. I'm running for Senate because I believe that Washington has a responsibility to create an environment that spurs job growth -- and then to get out of the way. The government's resources should be focused on investing in infrastructure, revitalizing our education system, and helping our veterans find employment. With so much left to be done to help Americans get back to work, we can't let Congress use limited funds to give themselves a raise. That 's why my colleagues and I are asking you to join us today in holding Washington accountable and saying Congress does not deserve an automatic raise: "" Thank you for your support, Patrick Murphy | "=" | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | ""
